name: Galaxy A55 5G
summary: Mid-range Android phone with 5G, AMOLED display, and long battery life.

specs.camera: 50 MP main camera with optical image stabilization

warranty: 1 year manufacturer warranty for device defects. Physical damage, liquid damage, and unauthorized repairs are excluded.
shipping: Standard delivery usually takes 3 to 5 business days after dispatch. Express delivery is available in selected PIN codes.
returns: Eligible for replacement within 7 days of delivery if the device is defective on arrival or the wrong item was delivered.

name: Redmi Note 13 Pro
summary: Value-focused Android phone with fast charging and high refresh display.
warranty: 1 year manufacturer warranty for handset defects and 6 months warranty for in-box accessories.
shipping: Standard delivery usually takes 3 to 5 business days. Remote locations may take 6 to 8 business days.
returns: Replacement is available within 7 days for dead-on-arrival, wrong item, or verified hardware defect.

name: StreamMax 4K TV Decoder
summary: 4K streaming decoder for smart TV and OTT apps.
warranty: 6 months service warranty for decoder hardware defects. Remote batteries and accidental damage are excluded.
shipping: Ships in protective packaging. Standard delivery usually takes 4 to 6 business days.
returns: Replacement is available within 7 days if the decoder does not power on or the wrong model was delivered.

name: BassPro Wireless Earbuds
summary: Bluetooth earbuds with charging case, touch controls, and noise reduction.

specs.battery: Up to 30 hours total playback with charging case
specs.controls: Touch controls for calls, music, and voice assistant
specs.microphones: Dual microphones with call noise reduction

warranty: 6 months accessory warranty for manufacturing defects. Ear tips, scratches, and water damage beyond splash resistance are excluded.
shipping: Usually dispatched within 24 hours when in stock.
returns: Replacement is available within 7 days for pairing failure, charging failure, or wrong item delivered.

name: OldGen HDMI Adapter
summary: Legacy HDMI adapter retained for old TV and monitor compatibility.

specs.ports: HDMI input and legacy output connector
specs.power: No external power required for supported devices

warranty: No active warranty for inactive catalog items.
shipping: This item is inactive and not available for new purchase.
returns: Returns are not available for inactive items unless the order was placed before the item was removed from sale.
